news.headline: TSA releases 2025 Canine Calendar, honoring over 1,000 explosive detection dogs. Download now! #TSA #CanineCalendar
news.summary: Today, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) in Washington, DC, announced the launch of the 2025 TSA Canine Calendar. This yearly tradition highlights the contributions of over 1,000 explosives detection dogs working throughout the country.

news.headline: Gateway Fiber secures $75M in debt financing, totaling $250M this year. Funds to expand fiber network in MO, MN, MA.
news.summary: Gateway Fiber, a prominent fiber internet provider based in Wright City, Missouri, has recently secured an additional $75 million in debt financing. This funding will support the ongoing expansion of Gateway's fiber network in Missouri, Minnesota, and Massachusetts until 2025. In total, Gateway has raised $250 million in debt financing this year. Texas Capital is serving as the Administrative Agent and Texas Capital Securities as the Lead Arranger for this financing initiative.

news.headline: JPMorgan declines transition financing, according to Bloomberg.
California Forward partners with UC Possibility Lab to boost economic resources for communities; focus on community and worker benefits agreements.
news.summary: California Forward (CA FWD) has partnered with the Possibility Lab at UC Berkeley to boost economic development resources in California. The collaboration focuses on aiding regions and communities in negotiating with project developers for community and worker benefits. It involves assessing successful models, establishing a database of best practices, and developing Community Benefits and Workforce Agreements between community groups, government, and developers. The initiative aims to enhance regions' capacity to access funding for clean energy, regenerative agriculture, and economic development. Kate Gordon, CEO of CA FWD, highlights the shared resources and capacity-building opportunities this project will provide.

news.headline: Mark Lamberti promotes synodal approach in corporate leadership at Catholic conference; 600+ leaders attend ALC in Johannesburg.
news.summary: More than 600 church leaders convened at Holy Family College in Johannesburg for the third annual Archdiocesan Leadership Conference. The event, organized by the Archdiocese of Johannesburg, witnessed a turnout of over 600 attendees. The conference featured prominent speakers and discussions on various topics related to church leadership.

news.headline: CPA firm BeachFleischman PLLC gains Indiva Advisors LLP, expanding into Las Vegas, NV with a national cannabis practice.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona on December 2, 2024, BeachFleischman PLLC revealed that Indiva Advisors LLP has become a part of their firm since November 1, 2024. This strategic move sees BeachFleischman expanding into the lucrative Las Vegas, Nevada market by incorporating Indiva, whose renowned national practice offers tailored accounting services.

news.headline: Generosity campaign launched to share gift of courage with 400,000 families fighting cancer across the US.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina on December 2, 2024, SpiritMedia.US announced its collaboration with authors John Vallely and Paul Weissenstein, the Pediatric Cancer Research Foundation, GiveButter, and additional partners to introduce a generosity campaign across the nation. This initiative aims to spread gifts and support to individuals in need in a collective effort.

news.headline: Fnac Darty offers to acquire all Unieuro shares through a public tender and exchange offer on December 2, 2024.
Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger retires, stock rallies. Two interim co-CEOs named as replacement.
news.summary: On Monday, Intel disclosed the retirement of CEO Pat Gelsinger, resulting in the appointment of two senior executives as interim co-CEOs. This development led to a surge in Intel's stock, with a notable increase in trading volume and a rise of approximately 5% in the share price. The departure of Gelsinger from the CEO position prompted investor interest and speculation about the future direction of the company, as reflected in the positive market response to the news.

news.headline: Tesla stock surged 37% post Trump's victory, sparking investor interest in its potential growth and autonomous driving tech.
news.summary: Since the election of Donald Trump as President, Tesla's stock has surged by 37%. Many investors are optimistic about the "Trump Effect" and the potential of autonomous driving technology. The question on whether Tesla's stock is a good buy is circulating among investors amidst this rally.

news.headline: Nucor and Cleveland-Cliffs stocks surge after Goldman call and tariff optimism under Trump presidency.
news.summary: Following the election of Donald Trump, stocks of U.S. steel companies such as Nucor and Cleveland-Cliffs have surged as prospects for the industry improve. Nucor's stock showed a significant increase, along with Cleveland-Cliffs, due to positive outlooks and hopes for tariffs. This positive movement was influenced by a call from Goldman Sachs, according to Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Retailers like Lululemon see boost as Black Friday spending rises, stocks rally for Burlington, Macy's, Williams-Sonoma.
news.summary: The notable surge in Black Friday spending has led to rallies for major retailers like Burlington, Macy's, Williams-Sonoma, Lululemon, and others. Lululemon and other retail giants witnessed a strong boost in sales during this period, encouraging optimism among investors.

news.headline: Amazon's AWS division starts Re:Invent conference with focus on generative AI, boosting stock.
news.summary: The stock of Amazon experienced an increase following the launch of its annual Re:Invent conference by the company's AWS division. The conference emphasized Generative AI and marked the initiation of the Re:Invent Customer Conference. This news was covered in a post on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Visual Comfort & Co. opens 3rd NYC showroom in SoHo, featuring 3,500 sq ft with vast lighting options.
news.summary: A new showroom by Visual Comfort & Co. has been launched in SoHo, marking its third location in New York City. The 3,500 square-foot space displays a wide range of lighting products. This showroom features the latest designs and collections, offering customers a diverse selection to choose from.

news.headline: Myant Corp, based in Toronto, adds a world-class leadership team to advance its vision of extending life with patented technology.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Toronto, Myant Corp revealed the recruitment of top-tier professionals to its executive team in order to propel its mission of extending lifespan through an innovative continuous interface utilizing their patented advanced materials. This move aims to bolster the company's strategic direction and enhance its technological capabilities. The specific number of new team members and the exact details of their expertise were not disclosed, however, the recruitment is expected to significantly contribute to Myant Corp's competitive edge in the market.

news.headline: Serstech has received 1.9 MSEK order from India partner Kapri Corp for Serstech Arx mkII and ChemDash software, to be delivered in Q1 2025 for law enforcement agencies.
news.summary: Serstech has recently secured a purchase order valued at approximately 1.9 million Swedish Krona (SEK) from Kapri Corp, its partner in India. This order includes Serstech Arx mkII devices along with ChemDash software. The delivery and invoicing for this order are scheduled for the first quarter of 2025. The intended users of this equipment are law enforcement agencies operating in India.

news.headline: 21st annual GT Tested Reader Survey awards winners in the travel industry announced; held by Global Traveler.
news.summary: YARDLEY, Pennsylvania - In the recently concluded GT Tested Reader Survey awards, perennial favorites in the travel industry were revealed for the 21st year in a row. Global Traveler conducted the survey, gathering insights from frequent luxury travelers. The prestigious accolades recognized the top performers, with the results highlighting the preferences of the well-traveled audience. This year's survey once again showcased the most esteemed names in the industry, a testament to their consistent delivery of exceptional service.

news.headline: Girls Inc. receives $15M grant from Lilly Endowment for character development. Grant will help foster positive character traits in young adults.
news.summary: A $15 million grant from Lilly Endowment Inc. has been given to Girls Inc. in New York to support the intentional development of positive character traits in young people. The grant aims to help ensure that youth grow into engaged, responsible, and caring adults.

news.headline: Abstrax and Seed Talent release Sensei Software for certified sensory panelists, offering paid opportunities with clients.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on December 2, 2024, Abstrax, a prominent company in cannabis research and terpene innovation, partnered with Seed Talent to introduce the Sensei Software and Training Program. Certified panelists will now have access to lucrative paid opportunities with clients of Sensei Software through this collaboration. This initiative aims to provide valuable training and work prospects for individuals in this field.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines named 2024 Airline of the Year, IHG Hotels & Resorts as Hotel of the Year by Global Traveler magazine.
news.summary: A premier travel publication has revealed Delta Air Lines and IHG Hotels & Resorts as the top winners in the travel industry. Released on December 2, 2024 from Yardley, Pennsylvania, Global Traveler magazine, catering to affluent frequent flyers, has named Delta Air Lines as the distinguished Airline of the Year for 2024. In addition, IHG Hotels & Resorts has been recognized as the outstanding choice for accommodations. This recognition further solidifies both companies' reputations within the travel sector.

news.headline: Rebecca Bennett joins Oshi Health as VP of Strategic Partnerships & Network Operations to enhance local in-person care.Characters: 109
news.summary: Bennett aims to enhance local in-person care by building stronger relationships with community healthcare ecosystems. Oshi Health, the sole nationwide interdisciplinary gastroenterology medical practice, is thrilled to reveal this.

news.headline: CobbleStone Software to host free virtual masterclass on contract management success on Dec 13th at 9 AM ET.
news.summary: Attend a complimentary virtual masterclass on contract management success offered by CobbleStone Software on December 13th at 9 AM Eastern Time. Based in Princeton, N.J., CobbleStone Software is a prominent provider of contract lifecycle management (CLM) solutions, acknowledged as a Leader in this field by the SPARK Matrix™. Don't miss out on this valuable learning opportunity to enhance your contract management skills.

news.headline: Amadeus Cytric Easy integrates with Hubli to offer self-serve booking for small meetings, hotel stays, and office spaces.
news.summary: A new self-service booking platform is set to streamline the process for corporate travelers by enabling them to book small meeting venues, group hotel stays, and internal office spaces all in one place. This centralized platform, based in Miami, was introduced on December 2, 2024. Meetings continue to play a pivotal role in business travel, and corporate travel managers are increasingly utilizing this platform for booking purposes. It offers convenience and efficiency by providing a one-stop solution for arranging various aspects of corporate travel, benefiting both travelers and travel managers alike.

news.headline: Engel & Völkers Snell Real Estate now exclusively represents LARENA in Los Cabos, Mexico, a family-oriented haven.超边界联系
news.summary: Engel & Völkers Snell Real Estate is excited to reveal their exclusive sales representation of LARENA, a family-friendly sanctuary designed by Ogarrio Arquitectos in partnership with the esteemed local design company IDS. With 27 years of experience, Engel & Völkers Snell Real Estate has established their expertise in representing this project.

news.headline: Waphyto debuts at The Store X, Berlin, bridging Japanese clean beauty to global audience with plant-based products.
news.summary: Waphyto, a renowned Japanese clean beauty brand, merges traditional herbalism with modern cosmetic science to produce clean beauty products that enhance daily routines. On December 2, 2024, in Tokyo, Waphyto introduced their innovative approach. This company offers a range of products that blend the potency of plants with cutting-edge cosmetic technology, aiming to provide customers with high-quality beauty solutions.

news.headline: Rebellyous Foods partners with Dot Foods to expand foodservice distribution nationwide, focusing on schools, restaurants, healthcare, and event venues. Seattle, Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: Rebellyous Foods, a leading plant-based meat producer, has extended its distribution to various sectors including schools, restaurants, healthcare facilities, and event venues. This Seattle-based company, known for its innovative approach to plant-based meat production, made the announcement on December 2, 2024. The expansion aims to cater to a wider audience and promote the adoption of plant-based alternatives. This move signifies a significant growth for Rebellyous Foods as they aim to reach a larger market.

news.headline: Emily Coyne Events now offers luxury destination wedding services in top US locations. Expansion announced on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, a well-known wedding planning company announced its expansion to popular wedding destinations across the country. Specializing in luxury destination weddings, the firm aims to provide couples with a unique and timeless celebration filled with romance and escapism. Wedding planners at the company will now bring their signature approach to various top locations, ensuring unparalleled experiences for clients. This move is set to cater to the growing demand for extravagant and unforgettable weddings, offering a range of services that align with these desires.

news.headline: Pittsburgh Penguins partner with Ordr to enhance fan experience by revolutionizing payment services. Transforming in-stadium and remote e-commerce transactions.
news.summary: Ordr, a leading payment processing platform in the sports and entertainment industry, is set to integrate with the Penguins' Commerce Operations. This collaboration, announced on December 2, 2024, aims to enhance various in-stadium and remote e-commerce transactions for fans. The partnership between Ordr and the Penguins promises to improve the overall payment experience, catering to a wide range of transactions. This development signifies a step towards modernizing payment systems within the sports industry, providing more seamless and efficient services to consumers.

news.headline: Fast Company's 2024 AI 20 List honors top visionaries and companies in AI. 20 leaders shaping the industry.
news.summary: Solidigm presented the annual list featuring the top 20 visionaries and companies shaping AI, in various aspects such as building, designing, regulating, and litigating. This recognition was announced in New York on December 2, 2024. Fast Company, a prominent media brand focusing on the crucial intersection of technology and business, covered this prestigious event.

news.headline: In-home care franchise, Right at Home, seeks expansion in Panama City, Florida with 700+ U.S. locations.
news.summary: An investment opportunity is being presented by Right at Home, a well-established in-home care franchise with over 700 locations in the U.S., aimed at individuals seeking to make a positive impact in the Panama City community. This initiative is supported by years of experience in the industry. The offer is currently available in Panama City, Florida, starting from December 2, 2024.

news.headline: Gertex Group acquires Pillar Tapes, a major adhesive supplier founded in 1959, enhancing packaging solutions portfolio.
news.summary: The Gertex Group of Companies has recently purchased Pillar Tapes, a prominent provider of adhesive and specialty tape items. Established in 1959 by Irving Kirsh, Pillar Tapes is renowned for its top-notch adhesive products tailored for industrial use throughout North America. This acquisition bolsters Gertex Group's presence in the market, expanding their offerings and reach.

news.headline: Pam Sexauer of Roth Staffing named to SIA's Global Power 150 Women in Staffing list consecutively for the third time.
news.summary: Pam Sexauer has achieved a notable milestone by being featured on the Global Power 150 Women in Staffing list for the third year in a row. The list, compiled by Staffing Industry Analysts (SIA), highlights the top women making an impact in the staffing industry. Pam Sexauer, the President of Roth Staffing, was acknowledged for her influential role among professionals in the field. This recognition underscores her leadership and contributions to the industry. The list is a prestigious compilation of 150 remarkable women, showcasing Pam's exceptional standing among her peers.

news.headline: Gimbel, Reilly, Guerin & Brown LLP in Wisconsin, founded in 1968, recognized 2024 Super Lawyers and Rising Stars, known for honesty and achieving positive results in complex civil litigation.
news.summary: Established in 1968, Gimbel, Reilly, Guerin & Brown LLP has been providing legal services in Wisconsin for over five decades. The firm is highly regarded by both the public and the legal community for their commitment to honesty and integrity. They have a track record of success in a wide range of cases, including complex civil litigation, thanks to their ability to deliver positive outcomes.

news.headline: ASHA warns noise from toys can cause hearing loss. Families urged to monitor volume of toys during holiday shopping.
news.summary: ASHA is advocating for the protection of young ears by urging families to monitor the volume of toys or products during the busy holiday shopping season. The American Speech-Language-Hearing Association in Rockville, Md., on December 2, 2024, emphasized the importance of safeguarding children's hearing. This initiative aims to raise awareness about potential hearing damage caused by loud noises or music from toys. Families are advised to be mindful of noise levels and choose toys that have a decibel limit below 85 dB to prevent hearing impairment in children.

news.headline: Super Micro's shares surge post conclusion of audit inquiry, rising by xx%.
Allsteel applauds Stanley Center for Peace and Security as Workplace Winner in 2024 Metropolis Planet Positive Awards.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 2, 2024, Allsteel marked the achievement of the Stanley Center for Peace and Security as the Workplace Winner in the 2024 Metropolis Planet Positive Awards. This accolade commends the center for its commitment to sustainability, equity, and innovation. This recognition signifies a major achievement for the Stanley Center, showcasing their efforts in promoting a positive impact.

news.headline: Pay bills using cryptocurrency from wallet or payment processor as online gateway, making transactions easier.
news.summary: Individuals have the ability to utilize cryptocurrency to settle bills either through their crypto wallet or via a payment processor functioning as an internet-based crypto payment gateway.

news.headline: Global synchrophasors market valued at US$258.9 million in 2023, with anticipated CAGR of 20.5% from 2024 to 2034, expected to surpass US$2.0 billion. Key drivers include grid modernization initiatives and integration of renewable energy. Market dominated by hardware, with key players like Siemens Energy and General Electric. Exciting growth expected in the industry.
news.summary: The global synchrophasors market was valued at US$ 258.9 million in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 20.5% from 2024 to 2034, surpassing US$ 2.0 billion by the end of 2034. This growth is driven by the increasing demand for reliable power systems and the need for grid modernization. Key drivers include grid upgrades, integration of renewable energy sources, and the focus on Wide Area Monitoring Systems (WAMS). Major players in the market include ABB, Siemens Energy, General Electric, and Toshiba Corporation. The market is segmented by component into hardware, software, and services, with hardware dominating. Applications of synchrophasors include fault location, stability monitoring, power system control, and wide-area situational awareness. Key end-users are power transmission and distribution systems.

news.headline: LibertyCoin Exchange in Kansas City boosts security and trading tools to provide a safe, user-friendly experience for investors. Features include multi-layered security, MFA, and advanced technology to protect user data and funds. #CryptocurrencyTrading #SecurityEnhancements
news.summary: LibertyCoin, a cryptocurrency trading platform based in Kansas City, Missouri, has implemented advanced security measures to ensure a secure and reliable experience for investors. The platform offers a multi-layered security strategy with features such as proprietary trading system, cloud security services, encryption protocols, DDoS protection, and Web Application Firewall. Additionally, LibertyCoin has enhanced its account security by mandating Multi-factor Authentication for all critical actions. These efforts are aimed at solidifying LibertyCoin's reputation as a trusted gateway for digital asset trading. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: European bond funds demonstrate stability in risk metrics amid uncertainty.
Fed's Bostic: We will have to wait and see how tariff or other policies of new administration shape the economy; as conditions change monetary policy will adapt.
Fed's Bostic: The economy is on solid footing, nearing price stability with labor market at or around maximum employment.
Fed's Bostic: I still think policy rate is restrictive.
Fed's Bostic: Contacts say there is not a lot of pressure to hire, but also not an expectation that labor market is going to weaken.
T-Mobile US CEO Mike Sievert to speak at UBS conference on Dec 9, 2024 at 12:45 pm ET. Webcast link: https://investor.t-mobile.comCharacters: 116
news.summary: The CEO of T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS), Mike Sievert, is scheduled to deliver a business update on December 9, 2024, at 12:45 p.m. Eastern Time at the UBS Global Media and Communications Conference. The presentation will be live-streamed on the company's Investor Relations website at https://investor.t-mobile.com, with an on-demand replay accessible after the event.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp boosts MRO ops with advanced CleanTech solutions, serving Fortune 500 and 1000 companies globally.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC), headquartered in Orlando, is an industry leader in developing laser systems for cleaning and material processing applications. Their cutting-edge laser cleaning systems are proving to be crucial for Maintenance, Repair, and Operations (MRO) facilities facing increasing demands. LPC serves top companies worldwide, including Fortune 500 and Fortune 1000 firms, providing advanced technology solutions to cater to the growing needs of the industry. The CleanTech products from LPC offer operators enhanced efficiency and performance in their operations.

news.headline: Weights & Biases releases W&B Weave at AWS re:Invent, aiding in generative AI apps. Tool supports workflow from experimentation to production.
news.summary: Weights & Biases, an AI developer platform, made a major announcement at the AWS re:Invent conference in Las Vegas. They introduced W&B Weave, now available to the public. This tool aids developers in assessing, monitoring, and continually improving generative AI applications for optimal performance. Weave is a user-friendly toolkit designed to support the entire generative AI process from experimentation to production and iterative enhancements. Notably, this tool streamlines the workflow and has been well-received within the developer community.

news.headline: Fed's Bostic: It is still an open question how fast and by how much rates need to be cut to keep inflation declining while avoiding undue damage to the job market.
Fed’s Bostic: My base case is that inflation remains on track to reach 2%.
Fed's Bostic: I am not going into December meeting with a sense that the outcome is preordained, coming data will be important; keeping options open.
